name: mdz
description: A token-savings advisor for agentic workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Get clear token-saving suggestions without changing how you ask agents to work.
interface.longDescription: MDZ Token Advisor checks prompts, tool output, and session history for safe token savings. It recommends whether to apply, ask, or skip optimization, and always shows expected savings, risk, latency, and local cache impact.
interface.defaultPrompt: Ask MDZ Token Advisor whether this session can be optimized safely.
